assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. This exactly matches the original entry in claude-md-configured.md. Role ('Rust backend service'), Serena Instance ('serena_backend'), and Path ('/home/user/trustify-backend') are all preserved unchanged.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. The new entry is added alongside the existing trustify-backend entry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 contain all 5 Jira fields unchanged: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'. All values match the original claude-md-configured.md exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two clearly labeled sections: '## Preserved (existing, unchanged)' (lines 3-8) listing trustify-backend, all Jira fields, naming convention, and serena_backend limitations as preserved; and '## Added (new)' (lines 10-13) listing trustify-ui in Registry and serena_ui limitations entry as new additions.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 5: '**serena_backend**: Already configured in the existing Repository Registry. No action needed.' Line 6: '**serena_ui**: Newly discovered from the MCP tool listing. Not present in the existing Registry.' Lines 11-12 summarize: 'Already configured: 1 (serena_backend)', 'Newly discovered: 1 (serena_ui)'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-29 preserve the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.') and the serena_backend find_symbol example verbatim. Line 33 preserves the existing limitation: '`serena_backend`: rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'. Line 34 adds only the new entry: '`serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
